tasks.subject: Task 1: 브릿지 hueCreds.ts — 파일 creds 스토어
tasks.description:
**Goal:** BRIDGE_HUE_FILE JSON 에서 Hue creds read/write/clear 순수 모듈 TDD.

**Files:** bridge/src/hueCreds.ts(신규), bridge/src/hueCreds.test.ts(신규)

**Acceptance:** env 미설정 read null/write throw/clear no-op; write→read 라운드트립 0600; 원자적 temp→rename; 손상JSON·필드누락 null; clear 후 read null; fileHueCredsStore 노출.

**Verify:** cd /var/home/umayloveme/workspace/tomboy-web/.worktrees/po/bridge && node --import tsx --test src/hueCreds.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/hueCreds.ts", "bridge/src/hueCreds.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd /var/home/umayloveme/workspace/tomboy-web/.worktrees/po/bridge && node --import tsx --test src/hueCreds.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["env 미설정 read null/write throw/clear no-op", "write→read + 0600", "원자적 temp→rename", "손상JSON·필드누락 null", "clear 후 read null", "fileHueCredsStore"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: 브릿지 hue.ts — pair persist + clip 폴백 + health + creds delete
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pair 가 creds 파일 저장, clip 파일 우선, GET /hue/health + DELETE /hue/creds 추가, server.ts 배선.

**Files:** bridge/src/hue.ts(수정), bridge/src/hue.test.ts(신규), bridge/src/server.ts(수정)

**Acceptance:** pair persist+persisted 플래그(throw→false+persistError, 409 미저장); clip file??body 파일우선·생략허용·400; health {configured,ip} 비밀미노출; creds delete clear; verifyToken 401; server 라우트; npm test 그린 + tsc 0.

**Verify:** cd /var/home/umayloveme/workspace/tomboy-web/.worktrees/po/bridge && node --import tsx --test src/hue.test.ts && npx tsc -p . --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/hue.ts", "bridge/src/hue.test.ts", "bridge/src/server.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd /var/home/umayloveme/workspace/tomboy-web/.worktrees/po/bridge && node --import tsx --test src/hue.test.ts && npx tsc -p . --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pair persist + persisted", "clip 파일우선·생략·400", "health 비밀미노출", "creds delete", "verifyToken 401", "server 라우트", "npm test + tsc 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: 앱 hueClient.ts — health/configured/context 재작성 + 옵셔널 creds
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 로컬 creds 없이도 브릿지 보관 creds 동작 — hueHealth(TTL캐시)·hueConfigured·getHueContext 재작성, hueClip 옵셔널, huePair persisted, hueClearBridgeCreds.

**Files:** app/src/lib/hue/hueClient.ts(수정), app/tests/unit/hue/hueClient.test.ts(신규)

**Acceptance:** hueHealth null/configured/15s TTL; invalidateHueHealthCache; hueConfigured local/bridge/none; getHueContext 3분기+null; hueClip 빈 creds 생략; huePair persisted; hueClearBridgeCreds; check 0.

**Verify:** cd /var/home/umayloveme/workspace/tomboy-web/.worktrees/po/app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/hueClient.test.ts && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/hue/hueClient.ts", "app/tests/unit/hue/hueClient.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd /var/home/umayloveme/workspace/tomboy-web/.worktrees/po/app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/hueClient.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hueHealth null/configured/TTL", "invalidateHueHealthCache", "hueConfigured 3분기", "getHueContext 3분기+null", "hueClip 빈 creds 생략", "huePair persisted", "hueClearBridgeCreds", "check 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: 설정 Hue 섹션 — persisted 메시지 + 구성 소스 + 브릿지 해제
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 설정 Hue 탭 — 페어링 브릿지 저장 표시(실패 폴백), 구성 소스(bridge/local) 표시, 브릿지 해제 버튼.
